description: Create a two-column content slide on geopolitical risk mitigation strategies with a horizontal bar chart on the left and a KPI callout on the right.

header.kicker: SECOND ANNUAL EY/EIU GLOBAL INSURANCE RISK MANAGEMENT SURVEY
header.headline: Figure 6: What strategies are you considering to mitigate geopolitical risks?
header.sub: The likely impacts vary across regions: for example, CROs based in Asia-Pacific are significantly more concerned about market volatility and monetary policy impacting interest rates; their mitigating actions speak to that elevated concern, with 62% of CROs at Asia-Pacific insurers saying they are adjusting their interest rate risk management, compared with 29% of all CROs.

series.label: Increasing political risk assessment and scenario planning

labels: Increasing political risk assessment and scenario planning
left.title: What strategies are you considering to mitigate geopolitical risks?

items.text: Enhancing cybersecurity measures — 60% EMEIA | 54% Americas | 62% Asia-Pacific
Increasing political risk assessment and scenario planning — 44% EMEIA | 46% Americas | 38% Asia-Pacific
Diversifying investment portfolios — 47% EMEIA | 32% Americas | 46% Asia-Pacific
Strengthening compliance and regulatory frameworks — 37% EMEIA | 25% Americas | 23% Asia-Pacific
Adjusting interest rate risk management — 23% EMEIA | 25% Americas | 62% Asia-Pacific
